hero.subtitle: Escape the ordinary and immerse yourself in the crystal-clear waters and golden sands of Annaba.

about.title: About The Trip
about.desc: Join Fersadou Travel for an unforgettable getaway to the stunning beaches of Annaba. Leave your worries behind and step into a day filled with relaxation, adventure, and perfect summer vibes.
about.f2Desc: Swim in pristine, clear blue sea.
about.f3Desc: We handle the details, you enjoy the trip.

included.title: What's Included
included.heading: Everything You Need For A Perfect Day

transport.title: Round-trip Transportation
transport.desc: Comfortable and safe travel from the departure point to the beach and back.

breakfast.title: Breakfast
breakfast.desc: Start your day right with a delicious morning breakfast.

tables.title: Reserved Beach Tables
tables.desc: Your own dedicated spot to relax, eat, and store your belongings.

horse.title: Horse Riding Experience
horse.desc: Enjoy a memorable horse riding session along the beautiful sandy shore.

swimming.title: Beach Access & Swimming
swimming.desc: Full access to the pristine beach and crystal clear swimming waters.

music.title: Live Guitarist Performance
music.desc: Vibe to acoustic tunes played live by our talented guitarist.

org.title: Full Organization & Assistance
org.desc: Our dedicated team will be on-site to assist you throughout the entire day.

departure.title: Departure
departure.desc: Gathering and departure to Annaba in our comfortable transport.

arrival.title: Arrival & Breakfast
arrival.desc: Arrival at the beach, settling at reserved tables, and enjoying breakfast.

beach.title: Beach Activities
beach.desc: Free time for swimming, relaxing, and horse riding by the shore.

music.title: Live Music Session
music.desc: Gather around for an acoustic live guitarist performance.

return.title: Return Journey
return.desc: Packing up and starting our journey back home with beautiful memories.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.heading: Simple & Transparent
pricing.limited: Limited spots available. Reserve early to guarantee your place.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.heading: Let's Plan Your Trip
contact.getInTouchDesc: Have questions or ready to book? Reach out to us directly through any of the channels below.
contact.formMsgPlaceholder: Tell us about any specific requirements or questions...
contact.alertMsg: Message sent! We'll get back to you shortly.

footer.desc: Crafting unforgettable travel experiences. We take care of the details so you can focus on making memories.
